lessons.title: 同位语从句
lessons.content:
### 一、同位语从句定义

- **定义**：对前面抽象名词进行解释说明的从句称为同位语从句
- **位置**：位于某些抽象名词（如 fact, idea, news, hope, problem 等）之后

### 二、常跟同位语从句的名词

| 名词 | 用法 |
|------|------|
| fact | The fact that he is honest is true. |
| idea | I have an idea that we should go there. |
| news | The news that he won made us happy. |
| hope | His hope that he would pass came true. |
| problem | The problem that we face is money. |
| question | The question whether we can go is unclear. |
| belief | His belief that everyone is equal is strong. |
| doubt | There is no doubt that he is right. |

### 三、同位语从句的引导词

#### 1. 从属连词 that
- The fact **that** he is honest is true.
- The news **that** she won made us happy.

#### 2. 从属连词 whether
- The question **whether** we can win is unclear.
- There is no doubt **whether** he will come.

#### 3. 疑问词
- The question **how** we can solve it is important.
- I have no idea **what** we should do.

### 四、同位语从句的位置

#### 1. 紧跟在名词后
- **The fact that** he is honest is true.

#### 2. 用 it 作形式主语（少数情况）
- **It is a fact that** he is honest.

### 五、同位语从句与定语从句的区别

| 特征 | 同位语从句 | 定语从句 |
|------|------------|----------|
| **作用** | 解释说明抽象名词的含义 | 修饰限定名词 |
| **性质** | 从句是名词的内容 | 从句是名词的修饰语 |
| **引导词** | that/whether/疑问词 | that/which/who/whom/whose/where/when/why |
| **例句** | The news **that** he came is true. | The news **that** he told me is true. |
| **翻译** | 他来了这个消息（是）真的 | 他告诉我的那个消息（是）真的 |

### 六、同位语从句的简化

- 同位语从句可简化为不定式
- The hope **to win** came true. = The hope **that** he **would win** came true.
- The decision **to go** was made. = The decision **that** we **would go** was made.

### 例句

#### that 引导
1. The fact **that** he is honest is true.
2. The news **that** she won the competition made us happy.
3. The idea **that** we should work together is good.
4. I have a belief **that** everyone can succeed.

#### whether 引导
1. The question **whether** we can finish on time is unclear.
2. There is no doubt **whether** he will come.
3. The problem **whether** we should accept the offer remains.

#### 疑问词引导
1. The question **how** we can solve this problem is important.
2. I have no idea **what** we should do next.
3. Please answer the question **when** we will have the meeting.

#### 同位语从句 vs. 定语从句
1. The news **that** he came is true. （同位语，解释 news 内容）
2. The news **that** he told me is interesting. （定语，修饰 news）

### 注意事项

1. **同位语从句的 that 不能省略**：
   - The fact that he is honest is true.

2. **同位语从句用 whether，不用 if**：
   - The question whether we can go is not decided.

3. **区分同位语从句和定语从句**：
   - 同位语从句：从句是名词的内容/解释
   - 定语从句：从句是名词的修饰语/限定

4. **同位语从句可简化为不定式**：
   - The hope to succeed is strong. = The hope that he would succeed is strong.

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当的引导词填空

1. The fact ____ he is honest is true.
2. The news ____ she won made us happy.
3. The question ____ we can go is not decided.
4. The problem ____ we should do next is important.
5. I have no idea ____ we will do.

#### 二、选择题

1. The news ____ he won made us happy.
   A. that B. which C. what D. when

2. The question ____ we can finish on time is unclear.
   A. that B. if C. whether D. which

3. The fact ____ he is right is clear.
   A. that B. which C. what D. whether

4. I have no idea ____ he will come.
   A. that B. if C. whether D. what

5. The idea ____ we should try again is good.
   A. that B. which C. what D. how

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. He is honest. The fact is true. （用同位语从句合并）
   _________________________________________________
2. We can finish the work. The question is not clear. （用同位语从句合并）
   _________________________________________________
3. The news is true. He came here. （用同位语从句合并）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. that    2. that    3. whether    4. what    5. whether/if

**二、**
1. A（that 引导同位语从句）
2. C（whether 表是否）
3. A（that 引导同位语从句）
4. C（whether/if 表是否）
5. A（that 引导同位语从句）

**三、**
1. The fact that he is honest is true.
2. The question whether we can finish the work is not clear.
3. The news that he came here is true.

### 注意事项

<!-- 记录易错点 -->

### 练习题

<!-- 可以添加练习题 -->

lessons.title: 定语从句（关系代词）
lessons.content:
### 一、定语从句定义

- **定义**：在句子中作定语，修饰名词或代词的从句
- **位置**：位于被修饰词（先行词）之后
- **结构**：先行词 + 关系代词/关系副词 + 从句

### 二、关系代词

| 关系代词 | 先行词 | 在从句中的成分 | 例句 |
|----------|--------|----------------|------|
| who | 人 | 主语/宾语 | The man **who** came here is my friend. |
| whom | 人 | 宾语 | The man **whom** I saw yesterday is my friend. |
| which | 物/事 | 主语/宾语 | The book **which** I bought is interesting. |
| that | 人/物 | 主语/宾语 | The book **that** I read is good. |
| whose | 人/物 | 定语（所有格） | The boy **whose** name is Tom is smart. |

### 三、关系代词的选择

#### 1. 先行词指人

| 情况 | 用关系代词 |
|------|------------|
| 主语 | who / that |
| 宾语 | who / whom / that |
| 所有格 | whose |

#### 2. 先行词指物

| 情况 | 用关系代词 |
|------|------------|
| 主语 | which / that |
| 宾语 | which / that |
| 所有格 | whose / of which |

### 四、关系代词在从句中的省略

- **作宾语时**，关系代词可以省略
- The book **(which/that)** I bought is interesting.
- The man **(whom/who/that)** I saw is here.

### 五、关系代词前介词的使用

- The man **to whom** I spoke is my teacher. （whom 前置）
- The man **who(m)** I spoke to is my teacher. （省略关系代词）

### 六、that vs. which 的区别

#### 1. 只能用 that 的情况
- 先行词是 all, everything, something, anything, nothing, few, one, the only 等
- The only thing **that** matters is health.
- All **that** glitters is not gold.

#### 2. 只能用 which 的情况
- 非限制性定语从句（用逗号隔开）
- The book, **which** I bought yesterday, is interesting.
- 先行词本身是 that
- The word **that** is used here is wrong.

### 七、whose 的用法

- Whose = of which / of whom
- The boy **whose** father is a teacher is my classmate.
- The book **the cover of which** is red is mine. = The book **whose** cover is red is mine.

### 八、who vs. whom

- who：主格，在从句中作主语
- whom：宾格，在从句中作宾语
- 口语中 who 可代替 whom
- The man **who(m)** I talked to is my teacher.

### 例句

#### who 引导（指人，主语）
1. The man **who** came here is my teacher.
2. The girl **who** is singing is my sister.
3. Anyone **who** wants to go can join us.

#### whom 引导（指人，宾语）
1. The man **whom** I saw yesterday is my friend.
2. The woman **whom** he married is very kind.
3. The people **whom** we invited are coming tonight.

#### which 引导（指物，主语/宾语）
1. The book **which** I bought is interesting.
2. The book **which** is on the table is mine.
3. The computer **which** I use is new.

#### that 引导（指人/物）
1. The man **that** I saw is my brother.
2. The book **that** I read is very good.
3. The only thing **that** matters is health.

#### whose 引导（所有格）
1. The boy **whose** father is a doctor is my classmate.
2. The house **whose** windows are broken is empty.
3. I have a friend **whose** mother is a teacher.

#### 关系代词省略
1. The book **I bought** is interesting. （省略了 which/that）
2. The man **I saw** is my friend. （省略了 whom/who/that）
3. The girl **he loves** is beautiful. （省略了 whom/that）

#### 介词 + whom/which
1. The man **to whom** I spoke is my teacher.
2. The book **on which** I spent much money is good.
3. The friend **with whom** I work is kind.

### 注意事项

1. **who vs. whom**：
   - who 在从句中作主语，whom 作宾语
   - 口语中 whom 可用 who 代替，但介词后仍用 whom

2. **关系代词作宾语时可以省略**：
   - The book (which/that) I bought is good.

3. **that vs. which**：
   - 只能用 that：先行词是 all, everything, only, the only 等
   - 只能用 which：非限制性定语从句（用逗号隔开）

4. **whose 的位置**：whose 后直接接名词，不能单独使用。

5. **介词 + which/whom**：介词可提前到关系代词前。
   - The man with whom I work = The man (whom/who) I work with

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当的关系代词填空

1. The man ____ came here is my teacher.
2. The book ____ I bought is interesting.
3. The girl ____ mother is a doctor is my friend.
4. The man ____ I saw yesterday is my brother.
5. I know the person ____ name is Tom.

#### 二、选择题

1. The book ____ I bought is very interesting.
   A. that B. who C. whom D. whose

2. The man ____ is speaking is my teacher.
   A. which B. who C. whom D. whose

3. The boy ____ father is a doctor is my classmate.
   A. which B. who C. whom D. whose

4. I know the girl ____ mother is a teacher.
   A. that B. who C. whom D. whose

5. This is the only thing ____ matters.
   A. which B. who C. whom D. that

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. The book is on the table. I bought it yesterday. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
2. The man is my teacher. I talked to him just now. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
3. The girl is very smart. Her father is a professor. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
4. I have a book. It is very interesting. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. who/that    2. which/that    3. whose    4. whom/who/that    5. whose/whose

**二、**
1. A（that 指物，作宾语可省略）
2. B（who 指人，作主语）
3. D（whose 表示所有关系）
4. D（whose 表示所有关系）
5. D（only 只能用 that）

**三、**
1. The book (which/that) I bought yesterday is on the table.
2. The man (whom/who/that) I talked to just now is my teacher.
3. The girl whose father is a professor is very smart.
4. I have a book which/that is very interesting.

lessons.title: 定语从句（关系副词）
lessons.content:
### 一、关系副词概述

- **定义**：在定语从句中代替先行词，表示时间、地点、原因、目的等
- **形式**：when（时间）, where（地点）, why（原因）

### 二、关系副词详解

#### 1. when（时间）
- **先行词**：time, day, year, moment 等
- **在从句中作时间状语**
- This is the day **when** he was born. = This is the day **on which** he was born.
- I still remember the time **when** we were together.

#### 2. where（地点）
- **先行词**：place, city, country, house 等
- **在从句中作地点状语**
- This is the place **where** we met. = This is the place **in which** we met.
- Beijing is the city **where** I grew up.

#### 3. why（原因）
- **先行词**：reason
- **在从句中作原因状语**
- That's the reason **why** I was late. = That's the reason **for which** I was late.
- Please explain the reason **why** you are absent.

### 三、关系副词 vs. 介词 + which

| 关系副词 | 相当于介词 + which |
|----------|-------------------|
| when = on/in which | 时间 |
| where = in/at/on which | 地点 |
| why = for which | 原因 |

- The day **when** he came = The day **on which** he came
- The place **where** we met = The place **in which** we met
- The reason **why** I left = The reason **for which** I left

### 四、关系副词在从句中可省略

- 先行词明确时，关系副词可省略
- This is the place (where) we met last year.
- That's the reason (why) I came here.

### 五、抽象先行词

- 某些抽象名词后也可用关系副词
- This is the point **where** we disagree. （分歧点）
- This is the stage **where** we are now. （阶段）
- That's the way **how** he solves problems. （方式）

### 六、难点：when/where/why vs. that/which

| 先行词 | 用关系副词 | 用介词+which |
|--------|------------|--------------|
| time | when | on which |
| place | where | in which |
| reason | why | for which |

- I remember the day **when** I met her. ✓
- I remember the day **on which** I met her. ✓
- I remember the day **which** I met her on. （口语）

### 例句

#### when 引导
1. This is the day **when** he was born.
2. I still remember the time **when** we first met.
3. Do you remember the year **when** we graduated?

#### where 引导
1. This is the place **where** we first met.
2. That's the house **where** I grew up.
3. Shanghai is the city **where** I work.

#### why 引导
1. That's the reason **why** I was late.
2. Please tell me the reason **why** you are absent.
3. Nobody understands the reason **why** he left.

#### 关系副词 = 介词 + which
1. The day **when** we met = The day **on which** we met.
2. The place **where** we work = The place **in which** we work.
3. The reason **why** I came = The reason **for which** I came.

#### 省略关系副词
1. This is the place (where) we met last year.
2. That's the reason (why) I came here.
3. I'll never forget the day (when) we got married.

### 注意事项

1. **关系副词不能作主语或宾语**，只能作状语。
   - 错误：This is the book when I bought.
   - 正确：This is the book (which/that) I bought. / This is when I bought the book.

2. **when/where/why 可用 that 替代**（口语中）：
   - The reason (why/that) I came is clear.

3. **关系副词可转换为介词 + which**：
   - when = on which
   - where = in which/at which
   - why = for which

4. **先行词是 time/day/year 时**，关系副词 when 更常用。

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当的关系副词填空

1. This is the place ____ we met last year.
2. That's the reason ____ I was late.
3. I still remember the day ____ we first met.
4. Shanghai is the city ____ I work.
5. Please tell me the reason ____ you are absent.

#### 二、选择题

1. This is the reason ____ I came here.
   A. which B. why C. when D. where

2. I'll never forget the year ____ we got married.
   A. which B. why C. when D. where

3. This is the house ____ I grew up.
   A. which B. why C. when D. where

4. The reason ____ he failed is that he didn't study.
   A. which B. why C. when D. where

5. This is the place ____ we can relax.
   A. which B. why C. when D. where

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. This is the place. We met here last year. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
2. That's the reason. I was late for that reason. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
3. This is the day. I was born on this day. （合并为定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
4. The reason is clear. I came here for this reason. （用 why 改写）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. where    2. why    3. when    4. where    5. why

**二、**
1. B（why 表原因）
2. C（when 表时间）
3. D（where 表地点）
4. B（why 表原因）
5. D（where 表地点）

**三、**
1. This is the place where we met last year.
2. That's the reason why I was late.
3. This is the day when I was born.
4. That's why I came here.

lessons.title: 限制性与非限制性定语从句
lessons.content:
### 一、限制性定语从句

#### 1. 定义
- 限制性定语从句是先行词不可或缺的修饰成分
- 没有它，先行词的意义不完整
- **不使用逗号**与主句分隔

#### 2. 特点
- 与先行词关系密切
- 删除后会改变句子含义
- 不能省略

#### 3. 例句
1. The man **who** helped me is my teacher. （帮助我的那个人是我的老师）
2. The book **that** I bought is interesting. （我买的那本书有趣）
3. Students **who** study hard will pass. （努力学习的学生会通过）

### 二、非限制性定语从句

#### 1. 定义
- 对先行词进行补充说明
- 删除后不影响主句含义
- **使用逗号**与主句分隔

#### 2. 特点
- 与先行词关系较松散
- 只是补充信息
- 可以省略

#### 3. 例句
1. My brother, **who** lives in Shanghai, is a doctor. （我哥哥住在上海，他是医生）
2. The book, **which** cost me 100 yuan, is very good. （这本书花了我100元，很好）
3. I gave him a book, **which** he liked very much. （我给了他一本书，他很喜欢）

### 三、两者的区别

| 特征 | 限制性定语从句 | 非限制性定语从句 |
|------|----------------|------------------|
| 逗号 | 无逗号 | 有逗号 |
| 关系词 | that/who/which | 只能用 who/which |
| 省略 | 不可省略 | 可以省略 |
| 翻译 | 译为"……的" | 译为并列句 |
| 先行词 | 泛指/特指均可 | 往往是特指 |

### 四、只能用 who 的情况

- 先行词指人，且非限制性定语从句中
- My father, **who** is over 70, is still healthy.
- 不能用 that 代替 who

### 五、which 引导的非限制性定语从句

#### 1. which 代替整个主句
- He didn't come to the meeting, **which** surprised everyone. （他没有来，这让所有人惊讶）
- She was ill, **which** is why she didn't come. （她生病了，这就是她没来的原因）

#### 2. as 引导的非限制性定语从句
- **As is known to all**, China is a developing country. （众所周知，中国是发展中国家）
- He is a good student, **as we all know**. （他是好学生，这点我们都知道）

### 六、常见结构

| 结构 | 用法 |
|------|------|
| which is why | 这就是为什么 |
| which is because | 这是因为 |
| as is known | 众所周知 |
| as is said | 如上所说 |
| as is reported | 据报道 |

### 例句

#### 限制性定语从句
1. The man **who** helped me is my teacher.
2. The book **that** I bought is interesting.
3. Students **who** study hard will pass the exam.
4. The girl **whose** mother is a doctor is my friend.
5. I know the reason **why** he was late.

#### 非限制性定语从句
1. My brother, **who** lives in Shanghai, is a teacher.
2. The book, **which** cost me 100 yuan, is very good.
3. I gave him a book, **which** he liked very much.
4. My father, **whose** name is John, is a doctor.

#### which 代替整个主句
1. He didn't come, **which** surprised everyone.
2. She was ill, **which** is why she didn't come.
3. They missed the train, **which** made them late.

#### as 引导
1. **As is known to all**, China is a big country.
2. He is a good student, **as we all know**.
3. **As was reported**, the meeting was successful.

### 注意事项

1. **限制性 vs. 非限制性**：
   - 有限制性：无需逗号，翻译为"……的"
   - 非限制性：需要逗号，翻译为并列句

2. **非限制性定语从句不能用 that**：
   - 错误：My brother, that lives in Shanghai...
   - 正确：My brother, who lives in Shanghai...

3. **which 可以代替整个主句**：
   - He failed the exam, which made his parents sad.
   - This is the result, which we didn't expect.

4. **as vs. which**：
   - as 引导的从句可放句首或句中
   - which 引导的从句通常放句末

### 练习题

#### 一、选择填空

1. The man ____ helped me is my teacher.
   A. who B. which C. as D. what

2. My brother, ____ lives in Shanghai, is a teacher.
   A. who B. which C. that D. what

3. The book, ____ cost me 100 yuan, is very good.
   A. who B. which C. that D. what

4. He didn't come, ____ surprised everyone.
   A. who B. which C. that D. what

5. ____ is known to all, China is a big country.
   A. Who B. Which C. As D. What

#### 二、用适当的关系词填空

1. The book ____ I bought is interesting. （限制性）
2. My sister, ____ lives in Beijing, is a doctor. （非限制性）
3. He failed the exam, ____ made his parents sad. （非限制性）
4. The reason ____ he was late is unclear. （限制性）
5. ____ is known to all, the earth goes around the sun. （非限制性）

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. The book is very interesting. I bought it yesterday. （改为限制性定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
2. My teacher is kind. He teaches English. （改为非限制性定语从句）
   _________________________________________________
3. He was late. That made everyone angry. （用 which 合并）
   _________________________________________________
4. China is a big country. As we all know. （合并为一句）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. A（限制性，who 指人）
2. A（非限制性，who 指人，不能用 that）
3. B（非限制性，which 指物）
4. B（which 代替整个主句）
5. C（as 引导非限制性定语从句）

**二、**
1. which/that    2. who    3. which    4. why    5. As

**三、**
1. The book (which/that) I bought yesterday is very interesting.
2. My teacher, who teaches English, is kind.
3. He was late, which made everyone angry.
4. As is known to all, China is a big country.

lessons.title: 倒装句
lessons.content:
### 一、倒装句概述

- **定义**：将句子中的谓语动词或助动词移至主语之前
- **分类**：全部倒装、部分倒装

### 二、全部倒装

#### 1. 定义
- 将整个谓语动词移至主语之前
- 主语和谓语位置完全颠倒

#### 2. 常见情况

| 情况 | 结构 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| 地点状语提前 | 介词短语 + 动词 + 主语 | **In the room** is a table. |
| 方向副词提前 | 副词 + 动词 + 主语 | **Out** ran the boy. |
| There/Here/Then 开头 | There/Here/Then + 动词 + 主语 | **Here comes** the bus. |

#### 3. 注意事项
- 主语是代词时，不倒装：Here he comes. （不是 Here comes he.）
- 谓语动词通常是 be/come/go/stand/lie 等

### 三、部分倒装

#### 1. 定义
- 只将助动词/情态动词移至主语之前
- 主语和部分谓语位置颠倒

#### 2. 常见情况

##### (1) 否定词提前（须部分倒装）
| 否定词 | 例句 |
|--------|------|
| never | **Never** have I seen such a thing. |
| seldom | **Seldom** does he come late. |
| rarely | **Rarely** do we go to the cinema. |
| little | **Little** does he know about it. |
| not until | **Not until** did he finish his work did he leave. |
| not only | **Not only** is he a teacher but also a writer. |
| no sooner | **No sooner** had he arrived than it started to rain. |
| hardly/scarcely | **Hardly** had I reached home when the phone rang. |

##### (2) only 提前
- **Only** then did I understand the truth.
- **Only** in this way can we solve the problem.
- **Only** when I saw him did I realize the mistake.

##### (3) so/such...that 结构
- **So** happy was he **that** he danced.
- **Such** was the weather **that** we had to stay inside.

##### (4) 省略 if 的虚拟条件句
- **Were** I you, I would go. （= If I were you...）
- **Had** he come, he would have helped. （= If he had come...）
- **Should** it rain, we would cancel. （= If it should rain...）

### 四、常见倒装句型

| 句型 | 结构 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| so + 形容词 | So + 形容词 + be + 主语 + that... | So angry was he that he couldn't speak. |
| such + 名词 | Such + 名词 + be + 主语 + that... | Such was his courage that everyone admired him. |
| neither/nor | Neither/Nor + 助动词 + 主语 | He doesn't like it. Neither do I. |
| only + 状语 | Only + 状语 + 助动词 + 主语 | Only then did I understand. |
| not only...but also | Not only + 助动词 + 主语 + 动词...but also... | Not only does he speak English but also French. |

### 例句

#### 全部倒装
1. **In the room** is a big table.
2. **Here comes** the bus.
3. **There lies** a book on the desk.
4. **Out** ran the children.
5. **Down** fell the leaves.

#### 部分倒装
1. **Never** have I seen such a beautiful place.
2. **Seldom** does he come late.
3. **Not until** I finished my work did I leave.
4. **Only then** did I understand.
5. **Only in this way** can we solve the problem.
6. **Not only** is he a teacher **but also** a writer.
7. **So** happy was he that he danced.
8. **Such** was the weather that we stayed inside.

#### 省略 if 的虚拟语气倒装
1. **Were** I you, I would go there.
2. **Had** I known the answer, I would have told you.
3. **Should** it rain, we would stay at home.

#### 其他倒装
1. I don't like it. **Neither/Nor do** I.
2. He can speak English. **So can** I.
3. **Hardly** had I got home when it started to rain.
4. **No sooner** had she arrived than the phone rang.

### 注意事项

1. **全部倒装中主语是代词时不倒装**：
   - 正确：Here he comes.
   - 错误：Here comes he.

2. **否定词提前必须部分倒装**：
   - 错误：Not until he came did I know.
   - 正确：Not until he came did I know. （已倒装）

3. **only 提前要部分倒装**：
   - 错误：Only he can understand.
   - 正确：Only then can he understand.

4. **not only...but also 句型**：
   - not only 放句首时，其后用部分倒装
   - Not only did he come late but also he forgot his homework.

5. **hardly/scarcely...when, no sooner...than**：
   - 主句用过去完成时，when/than 后用一般过去时

### 练习题

#### 一、按要求完成句子

1. ____ (Never) I have seen such a beautiful view.
2. ____ (Only then) I realized the truth.
3. ____ (Not only) he is a teacher ____ (but also) a writer.
4. Here ____ (come) the bus.
5. So tired ____ (be) she that she fell asleep.

#### 二、选择题

1. ____ came he home.
   A. Not until B. Not only C. Only when D. Never

2. Only in this way ____ solve the problem.
   A. can we B. we can C. we could D. could we

3. Not only ____ hard but also he works carefully.
   A. does he study B. he studies C. he study D. study he

4. ____ I were you, I would try again.
   A. If B. Were C. Should D. Had

5. Hardly ____ the house when it started to rain.
   A. I left B. did I leave C. I had left D. had I left

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. I have never seen such a beautiful place. （用倒装改写）
   _________________________________________________
2. He didn't come until I finished. （用 Not until 改写）
   _________________________________________________
3. If I were you, I would go. （用倒装改写）
   _________________________________________________
4. He can speak English. So can I. （合并）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. Never    2. Only then    3. Not only, but also    4. comes    5. was

**二、**
1. A（Not until 提前）
2. A（only 提前部分倒装）
3. A（not only 放句首部分倒装）
4. B（省略 if 倒装）
5. D（hardly...when 结构）

**三、**
1. Never have I seen such a beautiful place.
2. Not until I finished did he come.
3. Were I you, I would go.
4. He can speak English, and so can I.

lessons.title: 强调句
lessons.content:
### 一、强调句概述

- **定义**：通过特定结构突出句子的某个成分
- **方式**：It is/was...that/who + 被强调部分

### 二、It is/was... that/who 强调句

#### 1. 基本结构
- **强调主语（人）**：It is/was + 主语 + that/who + 其余部分
- **强调宾语（人）**：It is/was + 宾语 + that/who + 其余部分
- **强调其他成分**：It is/was + 其他成分 + that + 其余部分

#### 2. 时态
- 现在时：It is...that...
- 过去时：It was...that...

#### 3. 例句
1. It is **he** that/who helped me. （强调主语）
2. It is **English** that she teaches. （强调宾语）
3. It was **yesterday** that I met her. （强调时间状语）
4. It was **in Beijing** that I met her. （强调地点状语）

### 三、强调句的疑问句

#### 1. 一般疑问句
- Was it in 1999 that he went to America?
- Is it you that are looking for?

#### 2. 特殊疑问句
- When was it that you called me?
- Where was it that you lost your watch?
- Who was it that helped you?

### 四、not...until 的强调

- **结构**：It is/was not until + 时间 + that + 主句
- He didn't leave until I came. → **It was not until** I came **that** he left.
- Not until I came did he leave. → **It was not until** I came **that** he left.

### 五、do/does/did + 动词原形（谓语动词的强调）

- **结构**：do/does/did + 动词原形
- **含义**：确实、真的、的确
- **例**：I **do** love you. （我真的爱你）
- **例**：She **does** study hard. （她确实学习努力）
- **例**：He **did** come yesterday. （他昨天的确来了）

### 六、强调句与定语从句/状语从句的区别

| 句型 | 特点 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| 强调句 | 可还原为正常语序 | It is in Beijing that I met her. |
| 定语从句 | 有先行词 | This is the place where I met her. |
| 状语从句 | 无 that | It was because he was ill that he didn't come. |

### 七、强调句的还原

- 将 It is/was...that 去掉，剩余部分应是一个完整句子
- It is **because** he was ill **that** he didn't come. （because 引导原因状语从句）

### 例句

#### 强调主语
1. It is **he** that/who helped me yesterday.
2. It was **my mother** that called me just now.

#### 强调宾语
1. It is **English** that she teaches.
2. It was **him** that I saw at the supermarket.

#### 强调时间状语
1. It was **yesterday** that I met her.
2. It was **last year** that he went to America.

#### 强调地点状语
1. It was **in Beijing** that I met her.
2. It was **at the station** that I lost my bag.

#### 强调原因/方式
1. It was **because** he was ill **that** he didn't come.
2. It was **in this way** that he solved the problem.

#### do/does/did 强调
1. I **do** believe you.
2. She **does** work hard.
3. He **did** come to the party last night.

#### not...until 强调
1. It was not until **midnight** that he finished his work.
2. It was not until **I told him** that he understood.

### 注意事项

1. **强调句中 that/who 的选择**：
   - 强调人时可用 that 或 who
   - 强调物时只用 that
   - 强调主语时：It is he that/who...

2. **强调句不能强调谓语动词**：
   - 错误：It is works that he.
   - 正确：He does work. （用 do 强调）

3. **强调句与定语从句的区别**：
   - 强调句去掉 It is/was...that 后句子仍完整
   - 定语从句有先行词

4. **not...until 强调结构**：
   - 正常句：He didn't leave until I came.
   - 强调句：It was not until I came that he left.

5. **do/does/did 强调只用于肯定句**。

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当形式填空

1. It was yesterday ____ I met her.
2. It is English ____ she teaches.
3. It was in Beijing ____ I met her.
4. It was because he was ill ____ he didn't come.
5. I ____ believe you. （真的相信）

#### 二、选择题

1. It was in the library ____ I met her.
   A. that B. where C. when D. what

2. It is you ____ are to blame.
   A. which B. that C. whom D. when

3. Not until he arrived home ____ realize the problem.
   A. did he B. he did C. he had D. had he

4. It was not until midnight ____ he finished his work.
   A. that B. when C. where D. what

5. He did come yesterday. （强调）
   A. 正确 B. 错误

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. I met her in Beijing yesterday. （用强调句改写）
   _________________________________________________
2. He didn't come because he was ill. （用强调句改写）
   _________________________________________________
3. I do believe you. （对 do 提问）
   _________________________________________________
4. He didn't leave until I came. （用强调句改写）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. that    2. that    3. that    4. that    5. do

**二、**
1. A（强调句用 that）
2. B（强调人用 that/who）
3. A（not until 提前部分倒装）
4. A（强调句用 that）
5. A（do 强调正确）

**三、**
1. It was in Beijing that I met her yesterday. / It was yesterday that I met her in Beijing.
2. It was because he was ill that he didn't come.
3. Do you really believe me?
4. It was not until I came that he left.

lessons.title: 省略句
lessons.content:
### 一、省略句概述

- **定义**：在不影响理解的情况下，省略句子中的某些成分
- **目的**：使语言更简洁、避免重复

### 二、状语从句中的省略

#### 1. 省略主语和 be 动词
- **条件**：当主语与主句相同，且含有 be 动词时
- While **(I was)** reading, I fell asleep.
- If **(it is)** possible, please come early.
- When **(she was)** young, she was very beautiful.
- Though **(he was)** tired, he kept working.

#### 2. 省略 if 引导的虚拟条件句
- If **(I were)** you, I would go. → Were I you, I would go.
- If **(it should)** rain, we would stay home. → Should it rain, we would stay home.

#### 3. 常见省略结构

| 结构 | 完整形式 | 省略形式 |
|------|----------|----------|
| if any | if there is any | if any |
| if ever | if it has ever happened | if ever |
| if necessary | if it is necessary | if necessary |
| if possible | if it is possible | if possible |
| when necessary | when it is necessary | when necessary |

### 三、替代词 so/not

#### 1. so 替代
- 替代上文提到的肯定内容
- -Is he a student? -Yes, I think **so**. (= he is a student)
- -Will it rain tomorrow? -I think **so**. (= it will rain)

#### 2. not 替代
- 替代上文提到的否定内容
- -Is he not coming? -I think **not**. (= he is not coming)
- -Can you finish it? -I believe **not**. (= I can't finish it)

#### 3. so + 助动词
- He works hard. So **does** she. （她也是）
- He can speak English. So **can** I. （我也能）
- He didn't come. Neither/Nor **did** I. （我也没来）

### 四、并列句中的省略

- 省略重复的相同成分
- I like English and my sister **likes English** too. → I like English and my sister **does** too.
- He is a teacher and he **is** a good one. → He is a teacher and a good one.

### 五、动词不定式的省略

- 保留 to，省略动词原形
- -Would you like to go? -Yes, I'd like **to**. (= to go)
- -Can you help me? -I'll try **to**. (= to help)

### 六、常见省略表达

| 表达 | 含义 |
|------|------|
| if any | 如果有的话 |
| if ever | 如果曾经 |
| if not | 如果不是 |
| if so | 如果是这样 |
| what if | 如果……会怎样 |
| even if | 即使 |

### 例句

#### 状语从句中的省略
1. While **(I was)** reading, I fell asleep.
2. If **(it is)** possible, please come early.
3. When **(she was)** young, she was beautiful.
4. Though **(he was)** tired, he kept working.
5. If **(it were)** possible, I would help.

#### so/not 替代
1. -Is he coming? -I think **so**. / I think **not**.
2. -Will it rain? -I hope **so**. / I hope **not**.
3. He is a student. So **is** she.
4. He can't swim. Neither/Nor **can** I.

#### 并列句中的省略
1. I like English and my sister does **(like English)** too.
2. He is a teacher and a good one **is** he.
3. She sings well and so **does** her brother.

#### 不定式的省略
1. -Would you like to come? -Yes, I'd like **to**.
2. -Can you finish it? -I'll try **to**.
3. -Don't go if you don't want **to**.

#### 常见省略表达
1. If any, call me. （如果有的话，打电话给我）
2. If ever, I will remember this. （如果曾经有过，我会记住）
3. If necessary, I will help. （如果需要的话，我会帮忙）
4. What if it rains? （如果下雨会怎样？）

### 注意事项

1. **状语从句省略的条件**：主语与主句相同，且含有 be 动词。
   - While reading, I... （正确）
   - While reading books... （错误，reading 的逻辑主语不是 I）

2. **so vs. not**：
   - so：替代肯定内容
   - not：替代否定内容
   - 注意：I don't think so. / I think not.

3. **so does she vs. so she does**：
   - so does she：她也是（主语不同）
   - so she did：她确实做了（主语相同，强调）

4. **to 的省略**：
   - I'd like to. （to 不能省略）
   - Try to. （可以）

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当的省略形式填空

1. If ____ possible, please call me.
2. He is a teacher and so ____ she.
3. -Will it rain tomorrow? -I think ____.
4. When ____ young, he was very handsome.
5. -Would you like to come? -Yes, I'd like ____.

#### 二、选择题

1. If ____, call me.
   A. any B. some C. many D. much

2. He can speak English. So ____.
   A. can I B. I can C. do I D. I do

3. -Is he coming? -I think ____.
   A. so B. not C. no D. yes

4. While ____, I heard a strange sound.
   A. walk B. walking C. walked D. to walk

5. -Can you help me? -I'll try ____.
   A. to B. it C. that D. this

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. If it is necessary, I will help. （省略形式）
   _________________________________________________
2. He likes English. So do I. （合并为一句）
   _________________________________________________
3. I think that he will come. （用 so 改写）
   _________________________________________________
4. While she was reading, she fell asleep. （省略形式）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. possible    2. does    3. so    4. young    5. to

**二、**
1. A（if any 如果有的话）
2. A（so does she 她也是）
3. A（I think so 我想是的）
4. B（while walking 省略结构）
5. A（try to 省略 to 后保留 to）

**三、**
1. If necessary, I will help.
2. He likes English, and so do I.
3. I think so.
4. While reading, she fell asleep.

lessons.title: 主谓一致
lessons.content:
### 一、主谓一致定义

- **定义**：谓语动词必须与主语在人称和数上保持一致
- **原则**：语法一致、意义一致、就近原则

### 二、主谓一致的三大原则

#### 1. 语法一致
- 主语是单数，谓语用单数
- 主语是复数，谓语用复数
- The boy **plays** football. / The boys **play** football.

#### 2. 意义一致
- 主语形式是单数，但意义是复数，谓语用复数
- The police **are** looking for the criminal. （警察，复数意义）
- The family **are** all tall. （家人，复数意义）

#### 3. 就近原则
- 谓语与靠近的主语保持一致
- Either you or I **am** wrong.
- Neither the students nor the teacher **is** coming.

### 三、常见主谓一致情况

#### 1. 集体名词

| 集体名词 | 谓语用单数（整体） | 谓语用复数（成员） |
|----------|------------------|-------------------|
| family | The family is large. | The family are all present. |
| team | The team is strong. | The team are wearing different uniforms. |
| class | The class is big. | The class are doing different things. |
| audience | The audience is large. | The audience are clapping. |

#### 2. 复数名词作主语
- The shoes **are** under the bed.
- scissors, trousers, glasses, etc. （用复数）

#### 3. 不可数名词作主语
- The water **is** cold.
- The news **is** good.

#### 4. 名词+with/together with/as well as
- 谓语与名词一致，不受介词短语影响
- My father, **as well as** I, **is** going to Beijing.
- The teacher, **together with** his students, **is** visiting the museum.

### 四、就远原则（复数名词/代词）

- as well as, along with, together with, besides, except, but, with
- 谓语与主语一致，不受这些词影响
- Everyone **except** me **is** going. （except me 修饰 everyone）

### 五、数词/量词作主语

| 结构 | 谓语 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| a number of | 复数 | A number of students **are** here. |
| the number of | 单数 | The number of students **is** 50. |
| a lot of | 单复数均可 | A lot of money **is** spent. / A lot of people **are** here. |
| plenty of | 单复数均可 | Plenty of water **is** needed. / Plenty of people **are** here. |
| most of | 单复数均可 | Most of the time **is** spent on reading. |
| half of | 单复数均可 | Half of the apple **is** eaten. / Half of the apples **are** eaten. |

### 六、定语从句中的主谓一致

- One of + 复数名词 + 定语从句：从句谓语用复数
- The only one of + 复数名词 + 定语从句：从句谓语用单数

- He is one of the students who **pass** the exam. （复数）
- He is the only one of the students who **passes** the exam. （单数）

### 七、特殊主谓一致

| 主语 | 谓语 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| either...or | 就近 | Either you or I **am** wrong. |
| neither...nor | 就近 | Neither he nor I **am** wrong. |
| not only...but also | 就近 | Not only the students but also the teacher **is** coming. |
| there be | 就近 | There **is** a book and two pens. |
| all | 单数/复数 | All **is** well. （指事）All **are** here. （指人） |
| none | 单数/复数 | None of us **is** perfect. / None of them **are** perfect. |

### 例句

#### 语法一致
1. The boy **plays** football every day.
2. The students **are** very happy.
3. She **likes** reading books.

#### 意义一致
1. The police **are** searching for the thief.
2. The family **are** all at home today.
3. The audience **are** clapping loudly.

#### 就近原则
1. Either you or I **am** wrong.
2. Neither he nor she **is** available.
3. Not only the teachers but also the student **is** happy.

#### 集体名词
1. The team **is** the best in the country. （整体）
2. The team **are** wearing different uniforms. （成员）

#### 名词+介词短语
1. My father, as well as my mother, **is** coming.
2. The teacher, together with his students, **is** visiting the museum.

#### 数词/量词
1. A number of students **are** late.
2. The number of students **is** increasing.
3. Half of the apple **is** eaten.

#### 定语从句
1. He is one of the students who **work** hard.
2. She is the only one of the students who **passes** the exam.

### 注意事项

1. **a number of vs. the number of**：
   - a number of：许多（复数动词）
   - the number of：……的数量（单数动词）

2. **集体名词的单复数**：
   - 指整体时用单数，指成员时用复数
   - My family is large. （家庭）
   - My family are all at home. （家人）

3. **with/together with/as well as 后主谓一致**：
   - 谓语与主语一致，不受介词短语影响
   - He, together with his friends, is going.

4. **one of 结构**：
   - one of + 复数名词：定语从句动词用复数
   - the only one of + 复数名词：定语从句动词用单数

### 练习题

#### 一、选择题

1. The number of students in our class ____ 50.
   A. is B. are C. were D. be

2. A number of students ____ late this morning.
   A. is B. are C. was D. be

3. Not only the teacher but also the students ____ happy.
   A. is B. are C. was D. be

4. Either you or he ____ wrong.
   A. am B. is C. are D. be

5. The police ____ looking for the criminal.
   A. is B. are C. was D. be

#### 二、用适当动词形式填空

1. My family ____ (be) all at home today.
2. The team ____ (play) very well.
3. He is one of the students who ____ (work) hard.
4. She is the only one of the students who ____ (pass) the exam.
5. Half of the apple ____ (be) eaten.

#### 三、按要求完成句子

1. A lot of people ____ (be) at the party. （填空）
2. The family, together with their friends, ____ (go) to the park. （用正确形式填空）
3. The news ____ (be) good. （填空）
4. Neither he nor I ____ (be) wrong. （填空）
5. ____ of the students is absent. （None / The number）

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. A（the number of + 单数名词，单数动词）
2. B（a number of + 复数名词，复数动词）
3. B（not only...but also 就近原则）
4. B（either...or 就近原则）
5. B（police 复数意义）

**二、**
1. are（family 指成员，复数）
2. is/plays（team 指整体，单数）
3. work（one of + 复数名词）
4. passes（the only one of + 复数名词）
5. is（half of + 不可数名词）

**三、**
1. are
2. goes
3. is
4. am
5. None

lessons.title: 独立主格结构
lessons.content:
### 一、独立主格结构定义

- **定义**：在句子中作状语，但带有自己的主语的结构
- **结构**：名词/代词 + 非谓语动词/形容词/介词短语
- **特点**：独立主格有自己的主语，与主句主语不同

### 二、独立主格的构成

#### 1. 名词/代词 + 现在分词
- Weather **permitting**, we will go out. （天气允许的话）
- The work **being done**, we went home. （工作完成后）
- Night **coming on**, we went home. （夜幕降临）

#### 2. 名词/代词 + 过去分词
- The work **finished**, we went home. （工作完成后）
- The letter **written**, he went to post it. （写完信后）
- The meeting **over**, we left the office. （会议结束后）

#### 3. 名词/代词 + 形容词
- He **absent**, the meeting couldn't start. （他缺席）
- The weather **fine**, we went out. （天气好）

#### 4. 名词/代词 + 介词短语
- He **in the room**, we couldn't work. （他在房间里）
- The teacher **with a book**, the class began. （老师拿着书）

#### 5. 名词/代词 + 副词
- He **away**, we missed him. （他不在）

### 三、独立主格的作用

| 作用 | 说明 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| 表时间 | 相当于时间状语从句 | The work **done**, we went home. |
| 表原因 | 相当于原因状语从句 | The weather **fine**, we went out. |
| 表条件 | 相当于条件状语从句 | Weather **permitting**, we will go. |
| 表伴随 | 伴随主句动作 | He lay on the grass, his eyes **looking** at the sky. |

### 四、独立主格与 with 的复合结构

#### with + 宾语 + 补语

| 结构 | 例句 |
|------|------|
| with + 名词 + 现在分词 | He sat there, **with his eyes looking** at the sky. |
| with + 名词 + 过去分词 | The work **with it finished**, we left. |
| with + 名词 + 形容词 | She walked out, **with her head high**. |
| with + 名词 + 介词短语 | The man **with a bag** in his hand came in. |
| with + 名词 + 副词 | He slept, **with the light on**. |

### 五、独立主格的否定形式

- 否定词 not 放在前面
- **Not** finished the work, we couldn't leave.
- **Not** knowing the answer, I kept silent.

### 六、独立主格的独立主格 vs. 状语从句

- 独立主格：名词/代词 + 非谓语（主语不同）
- 状语从句：主语 + 谓语（主语相同可省略）
- Weather **permitting**, we will go. （独立主格）
- If weather **permits**, we will go. （条件状语从句）

### 例句

#### 名词+现在分词
1. Weather **permitting**, we will go out tomorrow.
2. The work **being done**, we went home.
3. Night **coming on**, the streets became quiet.

#### 名词+过去分词
1. The work **finished**, we went home.
2. The letter **written**, he went to post it.
3. The meeting **over**, we left the office.

#### 名词+形容词
1. He **absent**, the meeting couldn't start.
2. The weather **fine**, we went out.
3. She **still**, I couldn't hear anything.

#### 名词+介词短语
1. He **in the room**, we couldn't work quietly.
2. The teacher **with a book**, the class began.
3. She **with her hands full**, couldn't answer the phone.

#### with 结构
1. He sat there, **with his eyes looking** at the sky.
2. The work **with it finished**, we left the office.
3. She walked out, **with her head high**.
4. The man **with a bag in his hand** came in.
5. He slept, **with the light on**.

#### 否定形式
1. **Not** finished the work, we couldn't leave.
2. **Not** knowing the answer, I kept silent.
3. **Not** having received her letter, I couldn't reply.

### 注意事项

1. **独立主格与主句主语不同**：如果主语相同，应用状语从句的省略形式。
   - 正确：He came in, **smiling**. （独立主格，主语不同）
   - 正确：When **he came in**, he was smiling. （状语从句）

2. **现在分词 vs. 过去分词**：
   - 现在分词：与逻辑主语是主动关系
   - 过去分词：与逻辑主语是被动关系

3. **with 结构可转换为独立主格**：
   - With the work finished → The work finished

4. **独立主格没有谓语动词**，不是完整的句子。

### 练习题

#### 一、用适当的独立主格填空

1. Weather ____ (permit), we will go out.
2. The work ____ (finish), we went home.
3. He sat there, his eyes ____ (look) at the sky.
4. The teacher ____ (with a book) came into the classroom.
5. ____ (not know) the answer, I kept silent.

#### 二、选择题

1. The work ____, we went home.
   A. finish B. finished C. finishing D. to finish

2. He came in, ____.
   A. smile B. smiled C. smiling D. smiles

3. With the work ____, we left.
   A. finish B. finished C. finishing D. to finish

4. ____ the weather fine, we went out.
   A. Be B. Being C. Been D. To be

5. He lay on the grass, his eyes ____ at the sky.
   A. look B. looked C. looking D. to look

#### 三、按要求改写句子

1. Because the weather was fine, we went out. （用独立主格改写）
   _________________________________________________
2. He finished his work. Then he went home. （用独立主格合并）
   _________________________________________________
3. The work was finished, so we went home. （用独立主格改写）
   _________________________________________________
4. Because he didn't know the answer, he kept silent. （用独立主格改写）
   _________________________________________________

#### 四、答案

**一、**
1. permitting    2. finished    3. looking    4. with a book    5. Not knowing

**二、**
1. B（过去分词表被动）
2. C（现在分词表主动进行）
3. B（with + 名词 + 过去分词）
4. B（being 表主动）
5. C（独立主格，eyes 与 look 是主动关系）

**三、**
1. The weather being fine, we went out. / Weather permitting, we went out.
2. The work finished, he went home.
3. The work finished, we went home.
4. Not knowing the answer, he kept silent.

lessons.title: 长难句分析与拆解
lessons.content:
### 一、长难句概述

- **定义**：句子较长、结构复杂、包含多个从句或修饰成分的句子
- **特点**：信息量大、层次多、逻辑关系复杂
- **分析方法**：识别主干、分析层次、逐层理解

### 二、长难句的构成

#### 1. 复合句结构
- 主句 + 从句（名词性从句、定语从句、状语从句）
- 主句 + 并列句

#### 2. 多种从句嵌套
- 主句 + 定语从句 + 状语从句
- 主句 + 主语从句 + 定语从句

#### 3. 特殊结构
- 倒装句
- 强调句
- 独立主格
- 省略句

### 三、长难句分析方法

#### 步骤一：找主干
1. 找出主句的主语、谓语、宾语
2. 识别句子核心意思

#### 步骤二：识别从句
- 找出所有从句（以 that, which, who, when, where 等开头）
- 标记每个从句的类型和功能

#### 步骤三：分析修饰成分
- 找出形容词/副词/介词短语修饰谁
- 识别非谓语动词的逻辑主语

#### 步骤四：理解逻辑关系
- 分析各部分之间的因果/转折/条件/让步关系

### 四、常见长难句类型

#### 1. 多层从句
- The man **who told me** (定语从句) **that he would come** (宾语从句) **when the weather was fine** (时间状语从句) finally arrived.

#### 2. 嵌套结构
- It is necessary **that** (主语从句) **we should learn** (定语从句修饰 nothing) **which** (定语从句) **is useful**.

#### 3. 分割结构
- The time **when** we can meet (定语从句) **is** (系动词) **the day** (表语) **that** I mentioned (定语从句) **last week** (时间状语).

#### 4. 成分省略
- **When** (compared with) the older one, this new model is better.

### 五、长难句实例分析

#### 例句1
> The idea **that** (同位语从句) **the earth is flat** was rejected long ago.

- **分析**：主语 The idea，谓语 was rejected，同位语从句解释 idea 的内容
- **翻译**：地球是平的这一观点很久以前就被否定了。

#### 例句2
> The scientist **who** (定语从句) **devoted his life** **to** (介词短语) **the study** **of** (介词) **the universe** **and** (并列) **made** **great contributions** **to** (介词) **the mankind** **was** (系动词) **highly respected**.

- **分析**：主语 The scientist + who 引导的定语从句，谓语 was highly respected
- **翻译**：这位将一生献给宇宙研究并为人类做出伟大贡献的科学家受到了高度尊敬。

#### 例句3
> It is reported **that** (主语从句) **the number** **of** (介词) **the students** **who** (定语从句) **have** **computer** **in** (介词) **the school** **is** (系动词) **increasing** (表语) **rapidly**.

- **分析**：It 是形式主语，that 引导的主语从句中，the number 是主语，who 引导定语从句修饰 students
- **翻译**：据报道，学校拥有电脑的学生数量正在迅速增加。

#### 例句4
> Not only **does** (部分倒装) **he** **work** **hard** **himself**, **but also** (并列) **he** **encourages** (谓语) **others** **to** (不定式) **follow** **his** **example**.

- **分析**：not only 提前部分倒装，but also 连接两个并列谓语
- **翻译**：他不仅自己努力工作，还鼓励别人效仿他。

### 六、长难句翻译技巧

#### 1. 顺序翻译
- 按原句顺序从左到右翻译
- 适用于时间顺序或逻辑顺序与中文一致的句子

#### 2. 逆序翻译
- 从句子的后半部分开始翻译
- 适用于后置信息重要的句子

#### 3. 拆分翻译
- 将长句拆分成几个短句
- 适用于从句或修饰成分较多的句子

#### 4. 重组翻译
- 打破原句结构，重新组织
- 适用于逻辑关系复杂的句子

### 例句

#### 例句1：多层从句
> The teacher **who** taught us English last year, **who** has rich experience in teaching, **and** **who** is very patient with students, **will** go to Beijing next week.

- **分析**：主句 The teacher will go to Beijing，三个并列的定语从句修饰 teacher
- **翻译**：去年教我们英语的、经验丰富的、对学生很有耐心的老师下周将去北京。

#### 例句2：嵌套结构
> **It** is obvious **that** the person **who** makes the decision **that** we should accept this offer is wrong.

- **分析**：it 是形式主语，that 主语从句中，who 引导定语从句修饰 person，that 引导同位语从句修饰 decision
- **翻译**：显然，做出我们应该接受这个提议决定的人是错的。

#### 例句3：倒装句
> **Only** after we have fully understood the situation **can** we make the right decision.

- **分析**：only 提前部分倒装，after 引导时间状语从句
- **翻译**：只有在我们完全了解情况之后才能做出正确的决定。

#### 例句4：独立主格
> The work **being done**, the manager **having left**, we felt free to go home.

- **分析**：两个独立主格结构表原因/时间
- **翻译**：工作做完了，经理走了，我们可以回家了。

#### 例句5：强调句
> **It was** not until he failed **that** he realized the importance of hard work.

- **分析**：强调 not until 结构
- **翻译**：直到他失败了才意识到努力的重要性。

### 练习题

#### 一、分析下列句子结构

1. The book which I bought yesterday, which was written by a famous author, is very interesting.
   - 主句：________________
   - 定语从句：________________

2. It is believed that the person who made this decision is not qualified.
   - 主句：________________
   - 主语从句：________________

3. Only when you understand this can you make progress.
   - 主句：________________
   - 倒装类型：________________

#### 二、翻译下列句子

1. The scientist who devoted his life to the study of physics was respected by all the people.
   _________________________________________________

2. It was not until he got sick that he realized the importance of health.
   _________________________________________________

3. The work finished, the teacher left, and we went home.
   _________________________________________________

4. Not only did he finish the work himself but also he helped others.
   _________________________________________________

#### 三、答案

**一、**
1. 主句：The book is very interesting. 定语从句：which I bought yesterday, which was written by a famous author
2. 主句：It is believed. 主语从句：that the person who made this decision is not qualified
3. 主句：you can make progress. 倒装类型：Only + 状语 + 部分倒装

**二、**
1. 这位将一生献给物理研究的科学家受到了所有人的尊敬。
2. 直到他生病了才意识到健康的重要性。
3. 工作完成后，老师离开了，我们回家了。
4. 他不仅自己完成了工作，还帮助了别人。

---
